custom-sql.sql: SELECT OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion1.repository, OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion1.group_, OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion1.name, OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion1.version AS fromVersion, OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion2.version AS toVersion, OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion1.packaging FROM ( SELECT OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion.* FROM OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion WHERE (OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion.releaseAssetCategoryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion.owner = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] ( (OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion.group_ LIKE ?) OR (OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion.name LIKE ?) ) ) AS OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion.* FROM OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion WHERE (OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion.releaseAssetCategoryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion.owner = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] ( (OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion.group_ LIKE ?) OR (OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion.name LIKE ?) ) ) AS OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion2 ON (OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion2.group_ = OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion1.group_) AND (OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion2.name = OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion1.name) [$CHANGES_ONLY$] UNION ALL SELECT OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion2.repository, OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion2.group_, OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion2.name, OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion1.version AS fromVersion, OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion2.version AS toVersion, OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion2.packaging FROM ( SELECT OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion.* FROM OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion WHERE (OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion.releaseAssetCategoryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion.owner = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] ( (OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion.group_ LIKE ?) OR (OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion.name LIKE ?) ) ) AS OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion1 RIGHT JOIN ( SELECT OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion.* FROM OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion WHERE (OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion.releaseAssetCategoryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion.owner = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] ( (OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion.group_ LIKE ?) OR (OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion.name LIKE ?) ) ) AS OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion2 ON (OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion2.group_ = OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion1.group_) AND (OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion2.name = OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion1.name) WHERE OSBCustomer_ArtifactVersion1.group_ IS NULL ORDER BY group_, name
